title: Vibrant Thai Saudi Arabian Lamb Kebabs
description: Charred and tender lamb kebabs featuring Thai sweet basil and Saudi Arabian spices, cooked to perfection in an iron teppan
instructions: Preheat the iron teppan to medium high heat
In a large bowl, whisk together coconut milk, lemon juice, olive oil, garlic, salt, and black pepper
Add the lamb cubes to the bowl and marinate for at least 30 minutes
Thread the marinated lamb cubes onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece
Brush the teppan with a small amount of oil and cook the kebabs for 5-7 minutes per side, or until charred and cooked through
Stir in the chopped Thai sweet basil and Saudi Arabian spice mix into the remaining marinade
Brush the kebabs with the basil and spice mixture during the last minute of cooking
Serve the kebabs hot, garnished with additional Thai sweet basil if desired
